mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, domain, status, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from knowledge_base where id = #{knowledgeBaseId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update knowledge_base set name = #{name}, domain = #{domain}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
